front_matter_signals: FOREWORD  E UGENE F AMA, THE 2014 CORECIPIENT of the Nobel Prize in Economics and father of the efficient market hypothesis, has three words to describe momentum: “momentum is pervasive.” This is no small admission from Dr.

ACKNOWLEDGMENTS  If I have seen further, it is by standing on the shoulders of giants.  — Isaac Newton  I NEVER COULD HAVE WRITTEN THIS book had it not been for the substantial body of work by so many dedicated momentum researchers over the past 80 years.

PREFACE  Profit in the share market is goblin treasure; at one moment, it is carbuncles, the next it is coal; one moment diamonds, and the next pebbles. Sometimes they are the tears that Aurora leaves on the sweet morning’s grass; at other times, they are just tears.  —
best_excerpt: Parity with 12-month absolute momentum, as presented here, is more adaptive than normal risk parity and has the ability to exit fixed-income investments during periods of rising interest rates due to its trend-following nature.
